first post yay..... i love her so much slobbers all over... also im that into dollmaker person on tiktok.... yeah.... I can just hear the joyful screams from here... heh... anyways I have a yumeship art that I've commissioned. still waiting for it....... did you guys know I found out about the doll maker from an animation of I think medkit with that one "when ur rife with devastation" audio. its one of the videos that comes up when you search up the dollmaker. I first started commenting about the doll maker when I saw a ranking of every phighting character which included them. after that video i thought 'hmmm what if I commented that on every phighting video I see like that one red darkheart person?' and so I did..... now we're here and the dollmaker has a significantly more art. I'm just the best.

ooh my goodness my page just unloaded I was so scared j lost my progress... also HELLO??? someone started following me while I was working on this bot and like???? cause I don't even have any bots???? am i being followed by a fortune teller what???? this notification goes out to my one follower

holy yapping...
